global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent cashback offer and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting cashback offers with a strong call to action.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'EarnPath' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Cashback offer text
elements.description: A prominent text area displaying 'Earn cashback daily' in a large, clear font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Additional offer details
elements.description: A smaller text area below the main offer stating 'No hidden fees' in a readable font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button labeled 'Book now' in a contrasting color, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in the background, adding visual interest without distracting from the text.
